name: Cappuccino Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine nuts, sugar, and margarine; press into the bottom of a 9-inch spring-form cake pan. Bake at 325 degrees F., for 10 minutes.
2. In a bowl, mix cream cheese, sugar, and flour until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Stir in sour cream. Dissolve coffee granules and cinnamon in water.
3. Gradually add the coffee mixture to the cream cheese mixture, stirring until well combined. Pour over the crust.
4. Bake at 450 degrees F., for 10 minutes. Reduce the oven temperature to 250 degrees F. Continue baking for 1 hour. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan; cool before removing the rim. Chill. Garnish with whipped cream and whole coffee beans if desired.
